instruction: 帮我把各门店情况记录一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '门店'
ws['B1'] = '城市'
ws['C1'] = '月销售(万元)'
ws['D1'] = '客流量(人)'
ws['A2'] = '朝阳店'
ws['B2'] = '北京'
ws['C2'] = 85.2
ws['D2'] = 12500
ws['A3'] = '浦东店'
ws['B3'] = '上海'
ws['C3'] = 92.1
ws['D3'] = 15200
ws['A4'] = '天河店'
ws['B4'] = '广州'
ws['C4'] = 78.5
ws['D4'] = 11800
ws['A5'] = '福田店'
ws['B5'] = '深圳'
ws['C5'] = 88.9
ws['D5'] = 13600
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/store_data.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把各门店情况记录一下
从/home/user/Desktop/store_data.xlsx中找到月销售额最高的门店，在/home/user/Desktop/store_report.txt末尾追加：'销售冠军门店：浦东店（上海，92.1万元）'，保存
